scripts.build:copy: mkdir -p dist && cp src/styles/spartacss.css dist/spartacss.css && cp src/styles/sparta-icons.css dist/sparta-icons.css && cp src/styles/sparta-notifications.css dist/sparta-notifications.css
scripts.build:minify: lightningcss --minify src/styles/spartacss.css -o dist/spartacss.min.css && lightningcss --minify src/styles/sparta-icons.css -o dist/sparta-icons.min.css && lightningcss --minify src/styles/sparta-notifications.css -o dist/sparta-notifications.min.css
scripts.build: npm run build:copy && npm run build:minify
